summary: NextChat is a lightweight and fast AI assistant that supports various AI models, including Claude, DeepSeek, GPT-4, and Gemini Pro. It provides a user-friendly interface for deploying AI applications across multiple platforms while prioritizing privacy and customization for enterprise needs.
use_cases: Creating personalized AI chatbots for customer support
Integrating AI capabilities into existing applications for enhanced user interaction
Deploying a private AI assistant for internal company use with customized features
